recommendations.title: American Heist
recommendations.overview: Two brothers, both with troubled paths, find themselves in the middle of one last bank job.

recommendations.title: August: Osage County
recommendations.overview: An intense look at the lives of the strong-willed daughters of the Weston family, whose paths have diverged until a family crisis brings them back to the Midwest house they grew up in, and to the dysfunctional mother who raised them.

recommendations.title: Guns for San Sebastian
recommendations.overview: Leon Alastray is an outlaw who has been given sanctuary by Father John, whom he then escorts to the village of San Sebastian. The village is deserted, with its cowardly residents hiding in the hills from Indians, who regularly attack the village and

recommendations.title: Disorder
recommendations.overview: An ex-soldier with PTSD is hired to protect the wife and child of a wealthy Lebanese businessman while he's out of town.

recommendations.title: God Willing
recommendations.overview: The son of an atheist, authoritarian father, believed to be liberal, wants to become a priest.

recommendations.title: The Return of Don Camillo
recommendations.overview: Energetic priest Don Camillo returns to the town of Brescello for more political and personal duels with Communist mayor Peppone.

recommendations.title: The Rain Children
recommendations.overview: There is a world with two towns that are big enemies: Pyross and Hydross.

recommendations.title: High Noon

recommendations.title: Comme les 5 doigts de la main

recommendations.title: Wilbur Wants to Kill Himself
